title: Punniyamana Padhukayam
lyrics:
[Nadha mudi mel irukkum nalla pambe ragam]
Punniayamana Padhukaiyam… Punniayamana Padhukaiyam…
Athu Guru Ragavendrarin Padukayam..
Booloham vanagum padukaiyam..
Enakku Puthuiyr thannthidum pathukaiyam [Ragavendranain padyukaiyam]
Brindavanad Vantha padukaiyam
Bhathiye thanthidum padukaiyam..
Brahalanin avadhara padukaiyam..
Parama kripai checyyum padukaiyam [Ragavendranin paudkayiyam]
<<PAGE:201>>
